summary: Saponification reaction balanced and confirmed: glyceryl tristearate + 3 NaOH -> glycerol + 3 sodium stearate. Used as the worked example for stoichiometry-with-organic-substrate.

reasoning_overlay.step_1: Equation parsed into reactant and product terms
reasoning_overlay.step_2: Each element's atom count summed on both sides
reasoning_overlay.step_4: Charge balance verified (all neutral on both sides)
